title: Add/Copy need to support glob syntax
body:
This patch allows users to do
buildah add $ctr * /dest

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: This needs a test.  The example in the first comment would let the shell do the globbing, so it would either need to be quoted to avoid that, or tested using a Dockerfile.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/a6f7d725a062058df82603a507e229f2c08d7944.1500322815365489920/index.html)
Approved by: nalind
Pushing a6f7d725a062058df82603a507e229f2c08d7944 to master...
